## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Security Boundary Check

Does this require any new permissions, shell execution, clipboard reads, proxy mutation, route changes, packet capture, or diagnostic uploads?

## Alternatives

What simpler alternatives should be considered?
